title: B2 · Intermédiaire avancé
subtitle: Abstract ideas, opinions, discussions, idiomatic phrases.
focus: 2000 B2 French lemmas across public debate, economy, climate, technology, research, culture, law and advanced argument. Translation, example and example_en are placeholders for now.

groups.title: Group 1 · Core vocabulary
groups.focus: 100 real French lemmas across noun / verb / adj / adv / phrase. Translation and example fields are placeholders.

groups.title: Group 2 · Débat public et institutions
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for public debate, institutions, lawmaking, civic tension and public decision-making.

groups.title: Group 3 · Économie et mutations
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for markets, labour, budgets, inequality, trade and economic change.

groups.title: Group 4 · Climat et biodiversité
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for climate pressure, ecosystems, resources, agriculture and environmental policy.

groups.title: Group 5 · Technologie et données
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for algorithms, digital systems, cybersecurity, platforms and data use.

groups.title: Group 6 · Recherche et méthode
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for evidence, research design, uncertainty, experiments and scientific explanation.

groups.title: Group 7 · Ville et logement
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for urban planning, mobility, housing pressure, neighbourhoods and public space.

groups.title: Group 8 · Santé publique
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for public health, prevention, care systems, risk and wellbeing policy.

groups.title: Group 9 · Éducation et transmission
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for education systems, access, assessment, training and knowledge transfer.

groups.title: Group 10 · Médias et opinion
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for journalism, framing, misinformation, credibility and public discourse.

groups.title: Group 11 · Culture et patrimoine
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for culture, heritage, creation, interpretation and public access.

groups.title: Group 12 · Travail et organisations
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for management, cooperation, restructuring, productivity and workplace change.

groups.title: Group 13 · Justice et conflits
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for courts, rights, sanctions, conflict, responsibility and legal reasoning.

groups.title: Group 14 · Relations internationales
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for diplomacy, migration, security, cooperation and global challenges.

groups.title: Group 15 · Psychologie et société
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for identity, perception, behaviour, emotions and social pressure.

groups.title: Group 16 · Sciences et innovation
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for innovation, models, engineering, discovery, limits and applications.

groups.title: Group 17 · Environnement économique
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for business models, regulation, consumption, incentives and sustainability.

groups.title: Group 18 · Argumentation avancée
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for qualifying claims, rebuttal, evidence, assumptions and structured argument.

groups.title: Group 19 · Administration complexe
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for procedures, compliance, documentation, auditing and institutional processes.

groups.title: Group 20 · Connecteurs et expressions B2
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for idiomatic transitions, stance, precision, concession and discourse flow.
